value.0: Full suits of platemail provide the maximum protection possible.  Interlocking plates encase the body and smaller strips of plate known as 'lames' provide articulation.  Plate is heavy, cumbersome, loud, and should only be used by fighters of great strength.

The most recent recorded appearance of one of these weapons was in the black markets of Amn, rightfully commanding an impressive price. Several such maces have been found over time, each with an array of elemental spells and effects woven through them. The creator remains elusive, though the name "Petty" is evident on each example. It is possible he is a smith on Toril, but his obvious understanding of planar forces suggests a more traveled origin.
This Amulet grants its wearer greater resistance vs Magic spells.

Created by the dwarven blacksmith Kano from the early Stormblood clan, this blade is one of the most legendary weapons ever crafted by dwarven hands. It was created more than 700 years ago, when the dwarven hero Baerl, set out to slay Itharii the Devil. Since then it has gone from one hero to another, but in all of a sudden lost to history. Nobody has seen it since. This was more than 200 years ago, when Mallok the Strong was killed by beasts unknown.
A powerful glow and a stunning blitz radiate from this immense axe.

Whether by magic or the weight of history, the gold-seated throne exudes confidence and authority. Wise are the rulers who have called this seat their own.
The rustic table is filled with knife marks, faded charcoal etchings, and the stains of spilt food.
